acceptance_criteria.when: greet(name:) is called with an empty string ""
greet() is called with no arguments

acceptance_criteria.then: it is accessible as a public type with public initializer and both greet methods usable
acceptance_criteria.when: it is referenced from a test target via @testable import Greeter

items.description: Public type `Greeter` with `greet(name: String) -> String` returning "Hello, <name>!" and `greet() -> String` returning "Hello, world!".
